title: VMEE: Formally Certified Manipulation Evidence via Causal-Bayesian Inference

claims.claim: Probabilistic-to-logical proof bridge provides equisatisfiable encoding of Bayesian evidence in QF_LRA
claims.verification_method: Translation validation + Z3 SAT checking

claims.claim: QF_LRA encoding specification formalizes the translation from probabilistic evidence to first-order logic
claims.verification_method: Encoding spec validated against Z3 solver

claims.claim: Translation validation certifies that the QF_LRA encoding preserves probabilistic semantics
claims.verification_method: Round-trip validation of encoded claims

claims.claim: McCormick envelope linearization provides sound relaxation for nonlinear probability terms
claims.verification_method: Envelope bounds verified against exact product

claims.claim: Proof object extraction retrieves Z3 proof certificates for independent verification
claims.verification_method: Z3 proof object extraction and format verification

claims.claim: Circuit encoding certificate tracks gate-by-gate approximation error through the arithmetic circuit
claims.verification_method: Cumulative error tracking with budget enforcement

claims.claim: Encoding error budget bounds total approximation error from rational encoding
claims.verification_method: Error budget enforcement against 2^{-64} threshold

claims.claim: TCB analysis identifies 5 of 9 verification chain links as formally verified, with 4 documented assumptions
claims.verification_method: Programmatic TCB enumeration; 5/9 verified, 4 honest assumptions

claims.claim: Arithmetic circuit compilation produces exact marginals
claims.verification_method: Brute-force enumeration of all configurations for small instances

claims.claim: HMM-based manipulation phase detection infers latent manipulation states from observed order flow
claims.verification_method: Forward-backward and Viterbi on synthetic HMM data

claims.claim: Multi-prior inference tests posterior robustness across informative, skeptical, and uniform priors
claims.verification_method: Inference repeated under multiple prior specifications

claims.claim: Holm-Bonferroni correction controls FWER for PC algorithm CI tests
claims.verification_method: Unit tests verify correction preserves strong signals

claims.claim: FCI algorithm handles latent confounders (relaxes causal sufficiency)
claims.verification_method: Unit test verifies PAG output with edge marks

claims.claim: GES algorithm provides score-based causal discovery as alternative to constraint-based methods
claims.verification_method: GES discovers structure on synthetic DAG data

claims.claim: Prior sensitivity analysis quantifies posterior robustness across prior specifications
claims.verification_method: Robustness flag computed from posterior variation across prior classes

claims.claim: DAG misspecification bounds quantify posterior degradation under structural perturbation
claims.verification_method: Monotone degradation curve with TV distance bounded by 1

claims.claim: Structural change detection identifies regime shifts in causal graph over time
claims.verification_method: Windowed SHD detects injected structural change

claims.claim: Faithfulness sensitivity analysis quantifies edge stability under bootstrap
claims.verification_method: Bootstrap resampling with SHD computation

claims.claim: FO-MTL monitoring operates in decidable BMTL_safe fragment
claims.verification_method: Runtime fragment membership check rejects unbounded formulas

claims.claim: Compositional soundness framework separates object-level and meta-level claims
claims.verification_method: Programmatic compatibility checks + documented meta-level claims

claims.claim: Evidence bundles package causal subgraph, posteriors, temporal violations, and proof certificates
claims.verification_method: End-to-end pipeline produces verifiable bundle

claims.claim: Adversarial RL provides strategy-space coverage bounds via REINFORCE
claims.verification_method: Coverage = explored_cells / total_strategy_space (coverage=1.0 achieved)

claims.claim: Sim-to-real calibration validates synthetic LOB against published market statistics
claims.verification_method: KS-statistic comparison against reference distributions

claims.claim: Evaluation covers SEC enforcement action scenarios (Sarao, Coscia)
claims.verification_method: Scenario generation produces labeled manipulation data

claims.claim: Detection achieves F1=1.00 across all SEC enforcement scenarios
claims.verification_method: Automated benchmark: 3 scenarios x 3 runs, all F1=1.0

claims.claim: Baseline detectors (threshold, z-score, statistical) provide comparison points
claims.verification_method: Baseline F1=0.67 vs VMEE F1=1.0

assumptions_documented: Faithfulness assumption for PC/FCI causal discovery (sensitivity analysis provided)
Causal sufficiency for PC algorithm (FCI relaxes this)
Rational approximation error bounded by 2^{-64} (EncodingErrorBudget enforces)
SMT solver soundness for QF_LRA (decidable theory, Z3/CVC5)
RL coverage bound is lower bound on true coverage (coverage=1.0 achieved in benchmarks)
